Off Calendar Feb-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:(Zoom appearance)
Sahen Kolding, 415.926.7600 of Kaufman, Dolowich and Voluck for Plaintiff Cheers Development, LLC.
Tara Macomber, 415.604.3687 of Open Door Legal for Defendant Renee Vargas.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RENEE VARGAS' Motion To Set Aside Default is GRANTED per CCP 473(b). Defendant to file her answer no later than February 23, 2021. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
